title: Medical Coder
description: Broad Institute, a leading research center, seeks a Medical Coder to support our clinical research operations in Miami. You'll code clinical research data, maintain regulatory databases, and ensure accuracy in research documentation. Work onsite in a research-focused healthcare setting.
responsibilities: Code clinical research events and diagnoses using appropriate standards
Validate and verify source documents for coding accuracy
Maintain regulatory databases and audit trails
Ensure data integrity and completeness in research systems
Collaborate with research coordinators and clinical staff
Support regulatory compliance and FDA standards

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; certification in medical coding preferred
skills: Medical coding standards (ICD-10, MedDRA, or similar)

benefits: Paid time off and shift flexibility
